title: diospyros juruensis subsp. juruensis
intro: Diospyros juruensis subsp. juruensis is a subspecies of the Diospyros juruensis plant, a species of fruit-bearing tree native to South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Diospyros juruensis subsp. juruensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves or bark in water to create a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
